title: Warhammer Quest  - Take a Look - Part One - Introduction and Base Game (a)
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Ju3_gwctpM8

Daniel (@dungeondive) opens what will become one of the channel's most comprehensive series: a deep, multi-part examination of Warhammer Quest — the game he calls the undisputed king of all dungeon crawls. Part One covers the base game introduction, unboxing the components, and establishing why this 1995 Games Workshop release still commands reverence among dungeon crawler devotees.

This isn't a quick overview. It's the beginning of an archaeological dig through every expansion, every warrior pack, every White Dwarf issue that touched Warhammer Quest. If you've ever been curious why people speak of this game in hushed, reverential tones, start here.

----

What game would you call the undisputed king of its genre?
